title: 3 Facts About Sleep

segments.text: After just one bad night of sleep, your brain starts clearing out its own cells.
Sleep is far more active than it looks.
You are actually slightly taller in the morning than you are at night.
While you sleep, your brain flushes out toxins it built up during the day.
And humans are the only animals that delay sleep on purpose.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: You're taller in the morning and your brain cleans itself at night. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
